name: SUTRO BIOPHARMA, INC.
business: Sutro Biopharma is a clinical stage oncology company developing site-specific and novel-format antibody drug conjugates (ADCs) enabled by its proprietary cell-free protein synthesis platform, XpressCF, and site-specific conjugation platform, XpressCF+. Its lead product candidate is STRO-004, a single homogeneous ADC directed against tissue factor for the treatment of solid tumors.
sellsTo: pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies seeking ADC discovery and development collaborations

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage oncology company developing site-specific and novel-format antibody drug conjugates, or ADCs, enabled by our proprietary integrated cell-free protein synthesis platform, XpressCF , and our site-specific conjugation platform, XpressCF+.

catalysts.event: Report initial data from STRO-004 Phase 1 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report initial data from this trail in mid-2026.
IND enabling activities are underway for STRO-006 that could potentially support an IND filing in connection with this program in 2026.

We have initiated certain chemistry, manufacturing and controls, or CMC, related activities for the PTK7-targeting dual-payload ADC and anticipate filing an IND in connection with this program in late 2026 or early 2027.

catalysts.event: Astellas first iADC program enters clinical development
catalysts.sentence: The first iADC in the Astellas collaboration entered clinical development in the first quarter of 2026.
